case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNI. CORP. vs. DAVIS, VERTRINA Z. AKA VERTRINA DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNI. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, VERTRINA Z. AKA VERTRINA DAVIS $8,559.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,647.00, THE SUM OF $8647 WILL BE PAID BY DEFT. THROUGH A WAGE GARNISHMENT OF NOT LESS THAN $25 EVERY TWO WEEKS, COMMERNCING ON JUN 1,1999, PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
